message:
fix(interactive,providers): Refresh autocomplete catalog on resource reload and expose normalize_openai_base

Interactive mode fix:

- In PiMsg::ResourcesReloaded handler, rebuild and inject the autocomplete
  catalog from freshly loaded resources before updating the resources field.
  This ensures /reload and similar resource-refreshing operations immediately
  reflect new MCP tools, models, and resources in autocomplete suggestions
  rather than requiring an app restart

- Close any open autocomplete popup after catalog update to prevent stale
  suggestions from persisting across the reload

Provider module API change:

- Change normalize_openai_base() visibility from private to public (pub fn)
  to enable unit testing of URL normalization logic in tests/provider_factory.rs
  without duplicating the implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
